tests.description: Verifies that RBAC role assignments enforce correct permission boundaries across application modules
Validates that user sessions expire after the configured timeout period and cannot be reused after invalidation
Tests the OAuth2 authentication flow including token issuance, refresh, and revocation
Verifies that the CI/CD pipeline blocks production deployment without required approvals
End-to-end test that triggers a rollback and verifies the system returns to the previous known-good state
Validates that the deployment pipeline executes all required stages in order including build, test, and staging
Tests that invalid input records are rejected with appropriate error messages based on schema constraints
Verifies that alerting rules fire correctly when error rate and latency thresholds are exceeded
